# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: ci-service-account
  type: iam.serviceAccount
  properties:
    project: {{project}}
- name: service-account-binding
  type: iam.memberBinding
  properties:
    serviceName: ci-service-account
    role: roles/owner
    member: serviceAccount:{{service_account_email}}
